finding_results.notes: Threaded Diane's sensory and cognitive experience through separated paragraphs in the opening discovery run so the documentary coda no longer stays in pure external report for more than a few paragraphs. Also aligned Noor's terminal clock to 4:47 PM at chapters/chapter_18.md:57 to match the chapter-17 handoff and continuity sheet.

summary: The opening documentary sequence now includes repeated embodied access through Diane's smell, self-assessment, and momentary cognitive refusal, preserving the formal coda while restoring fictionality to the report-heavy stretch.
